description_long: This bungalow features a charming blue wooden exterior with white trim and a brown shingled cross-gabled roof. The front facade is adorned with three prominent gables, decorative trusses, and a covered porch with white railings and steps leading up to the entrance. A pergola structure extends from the right side of the porch, adding architectural interest and outdoor living space. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged on the front, with additional windows on the sides and rear, some of which are missing glass or frames. The roof shows signs of wear, including a visible hole on one side, suggesting age or disrepair. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century American Craftsman bungalows, blending decorative woodwork with practical, single-story living.
description: A blue wooden bungalow with a brown cross-gabled roof, white trim, and a covered front porch with a pergola. Symmetrical gables and decorative trusses highlight its Craftsman style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three gables, covered porch, and attached pergola.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the end gable, blue siding, and the pergola extending from the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long roofline, two dormer windows, and a visible hole in the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single gable, blue siding, and partial view of the porch and pergola.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
